package.name: g1_sim_bridge
package.description: Isaac Sim -> DLIO bridge (simulation only). A thin QoS relay that republishes the Isaac Sim MID-360 output (/livox/lidar PointCloud2 + /livox/imu_raw Imu, both BEST_EFFORT) as a RELIABLE /livox/lidar_reliable cloud and a RELIABLE /livox/imu so DLIO (direct_lidar_inertial_odometry) can consume them directly. Also ships the G1 DLIO configs (dlio_sim.yaml, dlio_mid360_real.yaml) and the sim localization launch. Not used on the real robot, where the Livox SDK driver publishes /livox/lidar + /livox/imu natively.
